title: feat: mark seedance and gpt-5.2 as paid-only
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Golden flowers for the hive
gist.blurb: Seedance and GPT-5.2 have graduated to our premium tier! This helps us maintain lightning-fast generation speeds and rock-solid reliability for our most powerful models.
gist.summary: Updated the model registry to transition the Seedance video model and GPT-5.2 text model to the premium tier.
gist.impact: Premium users now have dedicated access to these high-performance models, ensuring faster generation times and better overall system stability.
gist.visual_concept: A VIP or premium garden section. The bee mascot (Polly) wearing a tiny fancy top hat or bow tie, standing next to a glowing golden flower bed. The Nomnom creature happily eating a golden ticket.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny fancy top hat, watering a glowing golden code-plant in a lush digital garden. A round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a golden ticket nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
